title: eucalyptus gunnii subsp. gunnii
intro: Eucalyptus gunnii subsp. gunnii, also known as the Silver Dollar Eucalyptus, is a subspecies of the Eucalyptus gunnii tree, native to Tasmania and southern Australia. The leaves of the Silver Dollar Eucalyptus contain a compound called eucalyptol, which has been used for its medicinal properties, including its decongestant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is often used to relieve respiratory issues such as colds, coughs, and sore throats, and its health benefits also include reducing fever and alleviating stress. Herbal preparations of Eucalyptus gunnii subsp. gunnii include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used topically or inhaled to experience its benefits.
